runTitle: Local Nivo Chart Visual QA - Local Next.js Dev Server Exit Blocked
coveredSurfaces: local Next.js dev server startup with Turbopack
local Next.js dev server startup with Webpack fallback
skippedSurfaces: storage-nfs-dc1-01 performance tab hover tooltip visual verification
notes: Nivo visual QA was not executed because the local Next.js dev server did not remain available long enough for browser navigation.
Turbopack attempt: `next dev -p 3000 -H 127.0.0.1` opened port 3000, then `/dashboard` returned connection reset and the server process exited.
Webpack fallback attempt: `next dev -p 3000 -H 127.0.0.1 --webpack` also exited during `/dashboard` preflight; port 3000 was no longer listening.
This run is non-counting and does not change release QA totals. The remaining actionable path is to rerun the visual check from a stable ext4/CI/preview runtime.
